context_text: <A> well now the timber's actually down because of all the um the new regulations and it's kind of funny cause um a lot of timber workers would still be out of the bus out of a job ah / <B> okay / <A> cause about the same time these automated tools if you will these big things that like can process the the raw logs faster and better i saw a special on it { were } / <B> [ okay ] / <A> coming in to play about that same time / <B> okay / <A> so i think no matter what we would have lost a lot of jobs anyway / <B> okay / <A> but it was just bad timing to um the other thing is canada will ship ah wood and they'll actually subsidize it { where } / <B> [ okay ]
